# Guided Concept Path

## Intent
Lead the learner from felt need to explanation, formal knowledge, and practice through a steady scaffolded arc.

## Best For
- First exposure to a new concept
- Math, science, economics, and grammar lessons
- Structured teacher-led or independent reading

## Not Ideal For
- Topics that must open with a dominant visual
- Lessons centered on contrast between multiple equal ideas

## Learner Fit
- General
- Scaffolded

## Subjects
- Mathematics
- Science
- Economics
- English

## Lesson Flow
Hook -> Explain -> Define -> Example -> Practice -> What Next

## Required Components
- SectionHeader
- HookHero
- ExplanationBlock
- PracticeStack
- WhatNextBridge

## Optional Components
- DefinitionCard
- WorkedExampleCard
- PitfallAlert
- GlossaryRail
- DiagramBlock

## Why This Template Exists
This is the baseline Lectio lesson shape. It is predictable enough for first exposure and broad enough to prove the component system across many subjects.

## Responsive Notes
The glossary rail collapses away from the side on smaller screens while the lesson keeps a single main reading flow.

## Print Notes
Step-based content expands for print and the vocabulary support is flattened into the lesson flow.
